productName: Const HRG EFCT 1:2 Strawberry Lychee + Magnesium L-Threonate (200 CBN) 10 Pack (I)
description: Handcrafted sweet, juicy strawberry gummies inspired by old-world confectionery, where bright fruit purée, glossy sugar, and a silky cannabis infusion come together in one irresistible chew. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift and CBD to keep things calm and balanced in a 1:2 ratio. With added magnesium to support relaxation.
